{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,

    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The revised text maps against the nearest 3-5 works, but could benefit from more explicit contrast and a clearer articulation of the delta.",
    "R1.7": "The output flags one missing or wrong citation (aggregate fleet-level V2G dispatch baselines) and lacks bibliographic precision for the Wang et al. reference.",
    "RX.1": "The output flags uncertainty for two clearly out-of-reach claims (novelty of heterogeneous owner behavior and range anxiety as a utility cost).",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) with no drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the 2%/year degradation bound assumption).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including the Wang et al. citation."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The revised text maps against the nearest 3-5 works, but could benefit from more explicit contrast and a clearer articulation of the delta.
rationale.R1.7: The output flags one missing or wrong citation (aggregate fleet-level V2G dispatch baselines) and lacks bibliographic precision for the Wang et al. reference.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for two clearly out-of-reach claims (novelty of heterogeneous owner behavior and range anxiety as a utility cost).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) with no drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the 2%/year degradation bound assumption).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including the Wang et al. citation.
